misc: Rarely seen on the course without a drink in his hand
biography: Martin, representing St. Laurence Golf, is a celebrated and uniquely styled competitor within the esteemed Hector Trophée. The forthcoming Hector Trophée 2026 will mark his eleventh consecutive appearance, underscoring his enduring commitment to this distinguished pair competition. He is often noted for his distinctive on-course demeanor, frequently seen with a refreshing beverage in hand, a casual habit that belies his intense focus.

Throughout his ten prior participations, Martin has showcased a comprehensive mastery of both the individual and team formats. He has triumphantly secured the coveted Hector Trophée on one memorable occasion with his partner, demonstrating his capacity for strategic collaboration. Furthermore, his individual prowess is equally undeniable, having also clinched the prestigious Victor Trophy, a rare achievement that solidifies his standing as a truly versatile champion in this demanding event.

As he prepares for his eleventh challenge, Martin's blend of competitive success and his unique, unhurried presence on the greens continues to captivate. His proven ability to conquer both facets of the tournament ensures he remains a formidable and keenly watched participant, perpetually adding to the rich and evolving narrative of the Hector Trophée.
